name: Blade Mail
description:
Active: Damage Return

For %duration% seconds, return all incoming damage, increasing the percentage by %active_reflection_pct%%%.

Passive: Damage Return

Everytime you are attacked, you return %passive_reflection_constant% damage plus %passive_reflection_pct%%% of the attack damage dealt to you.
notes: Damage Return is calculated before any kind of reduction.
Returned damage type is the same as it was received.
Damage done by this item is considered reflected damage. Reflected damage does not provide any lifesteal and cannot be reflected.
lore: A razor-sharp coat of mail, it is the choice of selfless martyrs in combat.
